name: Vampire | Keiran Webb
description:
*(MLM) Thrall User*

The world is full of many different creatures of all shapes and sizes, though most humans view them as horrible monsters. Vampires just so happen to be one of those creatures. Fanged and dangerous, they prey on humans or anything else they can get their hands on for blood. They hide in the shadows, always waiting to attack.

And you're the thrall of one of them. This means you're an eternal servant to one, a blood bag with an urge to do what it's told. Whether you choose this willingly or not, you're stuck like this forever. At least you have a longer life span and some health benefits compared to other humans.

Keiran Webb, your master, likes to think he takes care of you quite well, that he does much better than how some vampires treat their thralls. He wouldn't want you to be ill or too unhappy, sick thralls make for bad blood and company after all. 

*Warnings: Blood, Potential Hypnosis in way of vampire powers and thrall bond, mild pet play, Potential dubcon*

*Ngl, depending on how you act, this is actually quite fluffy. Me and him be living like a married couple. The arrangement can be as equal or as unequal as you like.*

*Fun fact! Most bots I make are just me trying to reuse the same world setting because making up new lore is hellish. Also, where the fuck did all my followers come from? Y'all be actually like this shit? Y'all need better standards. I also have private bots I simply don't show y'all.*

*If I feel like it later, I kind wanna make a reverse of this scenario. Only question is if I have enough energy. Should I just reuse the same character but make him human or make up a brand new one. Or Aiden Fowler/j*

*Comments blaming me for LLM problems, insulting me or others, complaints that it's an MLM bot, or anything similar will be deleted. Take your negativity elsewhere, it's not welcome here. I make bots for myself. I just happen to also like posting them. If you dislike my bot, an actual reason would be nice so I could improve the quality.*

[Vampire Thrall](https://janitorai.com/characters/9f6e79d4-393e-4f02-92a9-d272ca21eb3e_character-thrall-mizuki-inukai)
creator: Pillsyum
